name: xingp14-woclaw
description: WoClaw skill/plugin for OpenClaw - Connect to WoClaw Hub for multi-agent communication

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && npx tsc --project tsconfig.build.json && cp -r skills openclaw.plugin.json bin dist/

channel.label: WoClaw
channel.blurb: Connect to WoClaw Hub for topic-based multi-agent communication.
